task_completion.description: Agent accessed the TB programme patient working list for Western Area Urban district.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the DHIS2 Tracker Capture or Tracker app open. In the left sidebar or selection criteria, 'Western Area Urban' is selected as the organization unit, and a TB-related programme (e.g., 'TB Case Surveillance') is selected.

task_completion.description: Agent exported the TB programme patient working list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking a download/export button in the Tracker interface, a browser download popup for the working list, or the exported file visible in the /home/ga/Downloads/ directory.

task_completion.description: Agent generated a bar chart showing TB programme case registrations by month for Western Area Urban for 2022.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the DHIS2 Data Visualizer app displaying a bar chart. The chart's axes, legend, or layout selections must clearly indicate months of 2022, 'Western Area Urban' as the org unit, and TB case registrations/enrollments as the data.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the visualization as a favorite with the required name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Data Visualizer interface with the title 'TB Notifications Western Area Urban 2022' displayed at the top above the chart, or a 'Save' dialog confirming this exact name.

task_completion.description: Agent exported the visualization data as a CSV or Excel file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using the 'Download' menu in Data Visualizer (e.g., selecting Plain data source -> CSV/Excel), a browser download popup for the chart data, or a second exported file visible in the /home/ga/Downloads/ directory.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the DHIS2 GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) navigating the DHIS2 interface at localhost:8080.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show the agent using terminal commands like 'curl' or 'wget' to interact with the DHIS2 API directly to fetch the data.

integrity.description: Files were downloaded via the browser interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of files in /home/ga/Downloads/ corresponds to browser download actions (e.g., visible download notifications or history), rather than files being manually created via terminal text editors or scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses the official DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database. The target programme is 'TB Case Surveillance' (or similar TB-related tracker programme). The target organization unit is 'Western Area Urban'. The target period is the year 2022. The agent must use the Tracker Capture (or Tracker) module to export the patient working list, and the Data Visualizer module to create the bar chart. The visualization must be named exactly 'TB Notifications Western Area Urban 2022'. A total of two files should be downloaded to /home/ga/Downloads/.
